landing.title: Rediscover your favorite music on vinyl.
landing.intro: To enjoy the full app experience you need:
landing.lifetime: One-time payment of USD 2.99 to unlock lifetime access.
landing.premium: Active Premium account on your streaming platform.
landing.permission: You will soon be able to access your Spotify account to sync your music.
landing.appleMusic: Allow access to your Apple Music account to play your music from Sona.
landing.note: The app does not include its own music. All content is played directly from your streaming account.

login.title: Login
login.subtitle: Fill your details to access your account and start enjoying the full Sona experience.
login.sessionActiveDesc: This account is already active on another device.
login.invalidCredentialsDesc: Please check your email and password and try again.

register.title: Create an account
register.subtitle: Fill your details to create your account and start enjoying the full Sona experience.
register.name: Name
register.price: One-time payment of USD 2.99 for lifetime access.
register.haveAccount: Do you already have an account?
register.paymentErrorDesc: Please try again in a moment.
register.paypalErrorDesc: Something went wrong with PayPal. Please try again.
register.registerErrorDesc: We couldn't complete your registration. Please try again.
register.successDesc: Your Sona access is now active.

connect.title: Connect your music
connect.subtitle: Allow Sona to access your library to control the current track in the app.

sona.EmptyPlayer: Play a song from your albums or playlists to view it in this section.

Queue.Warn: Playing music with Spotify will only display 20 songs in the queue. To view all of them, open your Spotify app.
Queue.AppleMusicNoQueue: Apple Music does not support viewing the playback queue
Queue.EmptyText: The songs in your queue aren't available when playing via Apple Music. Play from your albums or playlists to view your queue here.

options.title: Options
options.shareText: 🎧 Music is experienced differently at Sona. Download the app here:

connectDevice.noDevice: Open Spotify on your phone or computer and try again
